title: Python Rust Kohärenz sichern
goal: Doppelte Artefakt-Erzeugung zwischen Rust und Python durch Delegation oder gemeinsamen Drift-Wächter entschärfen.

acceptance.assertion: Der Diff dokumentiert und implementiert Delegation an Rust oder einen gemeinsamen Drift-Test.
Rust- und Python-Pfad validieren gegen dasselbe v1 Schema.
Python bleibt Probe, Adapter oder Delegationsschicht und wird nicht still zum zweiten Contract-Owner.

metadata.outcome: Heimlern PR #189 added a shared Rust/Python weight-adjustment coherence guard and moved CI to the shared guard.

verified_acceptance.coherence-path-chosen: PR #189 implements scripts/validate_weight_adjustment_coherence.py as the shared drift guard and routes CI through it.
verified_acceptance.same-contract: The guard validates the Rust fixture and Python OLA probe proposal against the same pinned policy.weight_adjustment.v1 schema downloaded from metarepo.
verified_acceptance.python-not-primary-owner: The guard restricts Python to the expected routing delta key, safe delta key characters, relative percent deltas and the heuristic probe simulation method; docs state metarepo remains contract owner.

checks: Local: python3 scripts/validate_weight_adjustment_coherence.py --schema .ci/policy.weight_adjustment.v1.schema.json passed after downloading the pinned metarepo schema.
GitHub PR #189 repo-root, templates, schema-validate, build-test, CodeQL, Analyze actions/python/rust succeeded.
